CustomField.description: Monthly Income (Eligibility) * To Be Cert, Family Rent Max Hsg vs Exp custom setting (35%). If percentage changes in the future, update help text and field label.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Monthly Income (Eligibility) * To Be Cert, Family Rent Max Hsg vs Exp custom setting (35%). If percentage changes in the future, update help text and field label.
CustomField.label: (F) Max $ - 35%
